hotels.name: Luxury Rodrigo Residence Home
hotels.description_fr:
L’établissement Luxury Rodrigo Residence Home se trouve à Londres, à 2,1 km du centre et à 1,1 km de ce lieu d’intérêt : Gare de Paddington. Il propose la climatisation, une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite et une terrasse.

Chaque hébergement possède une télévision à écran plat avec les chaînes du satellite. Vous bénéficierez également d’une cuisine complètement équipée comprenant une table à manger, ainsi que d’une salle de bains privative comportant une douche, des articles de toilette gratuits et un sèche-cheveux. Un réfrigérateur, un lave-vaisselle et un four sont également disponibles, de même qu’une machine à café et une bouilloire.

Un petit-déjeuner anglais/irlandais complet est servi sur place.
hotels.description_en:
Prime City Centre Location: Luxury Rodrigo Residence Home in London offers a central base with Paddington Station a 13-minute walk away. Nearby attractions include Hyde Park (1.2 km) and Madame Tussauds (17-minute walk).
Comfortable Accommodations: The bed and breakfast features family rooms with private bathrooms, air-conditioning, and city views. Each room includes a kitchen, washing machine, and free WiFi.
Relaxing Facilities: Guests can enjoy spa facilities, a terrace, and a fitness room. Additional amenities include a yoga studio, beauty services, and a minimarket.
Convenient Services: The property provides a free airport shuttle service, 24-hour front desk, concierge, and daily housekeeping. Free WiFi is available throughout the stay.
hotels.description_es:
Luxury Rodrigo Residence Home se encuentra en Londres, a 13 min a pie de Estación de Paddington y a 2,1 km del centro, y ofrece alojamiento con aire acondicionado, wifi gratis y terraza.

Cada unidad cuenta con cocina totalmente equipada con mesa de comedor, TV de pantalla plana con canales vía satélite y baño privado con ducha, artículos de aseo gratuitos y secador de pelo. También se ofrece nevera, lavavajillas y horno, además de cafetera y hervidor.

En el bed and breakfast se sirve un desayuno inglés/irlandés completo.

Cerca del alojamiento hay puntos de interés como Hyde Park, Museo Madame Tussauds y The Serpentine. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Londres - City) está a 16 km, y el alojamiento ofrece servicio de traslado gratis para ir o volver del aeropuerto.
hotels.description_pt:

Cada unidade vem com uma cozinha totalmente equipada com mesa de refeições, televisão de ecrã plano com canais por satélite e uma casa de banho privativa com chuveiro, produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos e um secador de cabelo. Um frigorífico, uma máquina de lavar louça e forno também estão disponíveis, assim como uma máquina de café e uma chaleira.

Luxury Rodrigo Residence Home disponibiliza pequeno-almoço inglês/irlandês completo.

Luxury Rodrigo Residence Home tem vários pontos de interesse populares nas suas proximidades, incluindo Hyde Park, Museu de Cêra Madame Tussaud's e The Serpentine.
hotels.description_it:
A 1,1 km da Stazione di Londra Paddington e a 2,1 km dal centro di Londra, Luxury Rodrigo Residence Home prevede alloggi climatizzati con WiFi gratuito e una terrazza.

Ogni alloggio comprende una cucina con utensili e tavolo da pranzo, una TV a schermo piatto con canali satellitari e un bagno privato dotato di doccia, set di cortesia e asciugacapelli. In dotazione anche un frigorifero, una lavastoviglie e un forno, oltre a una macchina da caffè e un bollitore elettrico.

Questo bed and breakfast offre una colazione inglese/irlandese.

I luoghi di interesse più famosi nei dintorni di Luxury Rodrigo Residence Home includono Hyde Park, Museo delle Cere Madame Tussauds e Lago Serpentine.

hotels.name: Henrys Townhouse Marylebone, London

Comfortable Amenities: Guests enjoy a lounge, beauty services, concierge, and full-day security. Additional facilities include bike hire, luggage storage, and an outdoor seating area.

Prime Location: Located in the city centre, the hotel is a 15-minute walk from Madame Tussauds and 1.3 km from Paddington Station. Nearby attractions include Oxford Street and Regents Park.

Les chambres du Tremarne Hotel sont décorées individuellement et offrent toutes une vue sur la campagne ou la mer. Toutes les chambres disposent d'une salle de bains privative et d'une télévision à écran plat. Certaines chambres disposent d'un balcon privé, tandis que l'établissement possède une terrasse spacieuse et un jardin. Veuillez noter que l'établissement ne possède pas d'ascenseur. Nous avons des marches dans le bâtiment, puis des escaliers jusqu'au niveau de nos chambres.
hotels.description_en:

Rooms at Tremarne Hotel are individually style, and each enjoys either a country or sea view. All rooms are en suite and have a flat-screen TV. Certain rooms have a private balcony, whilst the property itself has a spacious terrace and garden. Please note we do not have a lift. We have steps into the building, and then stair cases up to our room levels.

Breakfast is included in the room rate.

Las habitaciones del Tremarne Hotel presentan un estilo individual y ofrecen vistas al campo o al mar. Todas las habitaciones disponen de baño y TV de pantalla plana. Algunas habitaciones tienen balcón privado, mientras que el establecimiento cuenta con una amplia terraza y jardín. El establecimiento no dispone de ascensor. Tenemos escalones en el edificio, y luego escaleras hasta nuestros niveles de habitación.

El desayuno está incluido en el precio de la habitación.

hotels.name: The Mirador Boutique Town House
hotels.description_fr:
Breakfast in Bed: is offered to everyone staying at The Mirador Boutique Town House. No need to get dressed and come down to breakfast here, as a beautiful boutique style Continental Breakfast is provided free of charge and is ready and waiting for you in the room of your choice and with only 6 rooms to choose from, it really is a case of: First come-first served.
The Mirador truly is a 21st century Boutique Town House with every room designed with both couples in mind, including mums & dads and corporate clients who want to stay somewhere that’s both fun and interesting, a step outside the normal corporate hotel.
So, step inside and enjoy the ambiance, the food and of cause ‘The Rooms’.

hotels.name: Park House Hotel
hotels.description_fr:
Située dans un domaine d'une beauté naturelle exceptionnelle, cette charmante maison victorienne est entourée de 10 hectares de terrain dans le village de Bepton, dans le Sussex occidental. Offrant une vue magnifique sur le parc national des South Downs, il met gratuitement à votre disposition une connexion Wi-Fi et un parking.

Le Park House Hotel propose un buffet de ferme et un petit-déjeuner anglais complet chaque matin. Dans le salon, vous pourrez déguster un goûter traditionnel composé de biscuits fraîchement sortis du four et de gâteaux faits maison. Le dimanche, vous pourrez également déguster des plats préparés à partir d'ingrédients frais de saison produits localement.
hotels.description_en:
In an Area of Outstanding Natural Beauty, this charming Victorian house is surrounded by 10 acres of grounds in the village of Bepton in West Sussex. It has free Wi-Fi, free parking, and beautiful views of the South Downs National Park.

Park House Hotel provides a farmhouse buffet and full English breakfast each morning, and in the drawing room you can enjoy traditional afternoon tea with freshly baked biscuits and homemade cakes. Sunday lunches are also served, with food made from fresh, locally produced seasonal ingredients.

Park House allow dogs into certain parts of the hotel, and offer Cottage Suites which can accommodate dogs overnight.

Leisure facilities include a 15-metre indoor swimming pool, Jacuzzi®, steam room, sauna, gym and fitness studio.
hotels.description_es:
Esta encantadora casa victoriana se encuentra en una zona de excepcional belleza natural de la localidad de Bepton, en West Sussex, y está rodeada por un terreno de 1,2 hectáreas. Ofrece conexión Wi-Fi gratuita, aparcamiento gratuito y hermosas vistas al parque nacional de South Downs.

El Park House Hotel ofrece un buffet de granja y un desayuno inglés completo todas las mañanas. En el salón se puede disfrutar del tradicional té de la tarde con galletas recién horneadas y pasteles caseros. Los domingos se sirven almuerzos elaborados con ingredientes frescos de temporada de producción local.

El Park House admite perros en algunas partes del hotel y ofrece suites tipo cabaña con capacidad para perros durante la noche.
hotels.description_pt:
In an Area of Outstanding Natural Beauty, this charming Victorian house is surrounded by 10 acres of grounds in the village of Bepton in West Sussex. It has free Wi-Fi, free parking, and beautiful views of the South Downs National Park.

Park House Hotel provides a farmhouse buffet and full English breakfast each morning, and in the drawing room you can enjoy traditional afternoon tea with freshly baked biscuits and homemade cakes. Sunday lunches are also served, with food made from fresh, locally produced seasonal ingredients.

Park House allow dogs into certain parts of the hotel, and offer Cottage Suites which can accommodate dogs overnight.

Leisure facilities include a 15-metre indoor swimming pool, Jacuzzi®, steam room, sauna, gym and fitness studio.
